'''namobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibroadipocyte|fibroadipocyte]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibroadipocyte|fibroadipocyte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| namobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || næmebeth || næmebej || næmebesh || næmebe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || namomoboth || namomoboj || namomobosh || namomobo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || namoboth || namoboj || namobosh || namobo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || namofbofth || namofbofj || namofbofsh || namofbof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || namobotho || namobojo || namobosho || namoboko
|-
| [[Patient]] || namoboth || namoboj || namobosh || namobo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || namobothol || namobojol || namoboshol || namobokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || namoboothotho || namoboojojo || namobooshosho || namobooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || namobothon || namobojon || namoboshon || namobokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || namobothooro || namobojooro || namoboshooro || namobokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
